sizing_rule.note: Position sizing via Geometric Average Trade (GAT) formula: GAT = G × (Biggest Loss / -f), where G is geometric mean and f is optimal fraction. Size only after confirming positive expectancy through geometric mean consistency, not arithmetic average. Actual optimal_f value not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on the geometric average trade (GAT) rather than arithmetic mean, accounting for both profitability and consistency through reinvestment of returns.
